/CAL:SENTENCE MODIFICATION AFTER REMITITUR FROM COURT OF APPEAL/X:THIS ISA CONSOLIDATED INFORMATION FOR COURT NUMBERS 14018618, 14032118 AND 16007903/X:THE  COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING FINDINGS:/X: AS TO COUNTS 14 & 15 THEALLEGATION PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 667,9(A) IS ORDERED STRICKEN,/X:AS TO COUNTS 2, 7, 10, & 13 THE SENTENCE IS THE SAME BUT STAYED PURSUANT TO PC 654, INCLUDING THE SENTENCE AS TO THE PC 667,9(A) ALLEGATION,/X: ALLOTHER TERMS AND CONDITONS OF THE SENTENCE REMAINS THE SAME AS IMPOSED ON 09-06-17/X:DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO 326 YEARS TO LIFE/

/X DEFENSE ROMERO MOTION ARGUED AND SUBMITTED AND DENIED BY THE COURT,/XOURT HEARS FROM A MEMBER OF A VICTIM'S FAMILY, MARY BOWE,/X:THE COURT HEARS FROM THE DEFENDANT,/X:CASE NUMBERS 14032118, 14018618 AND 16007903 ARE CONSOLIDATED/TEXT:47 YEARS TO LIFE WITH POSSIBILITY OF PAROLE/LWP1:47/STATES/X:SENTENCE IS PRONOUNCED PURSUANT TO PC 667 (B) THROUGH (I) AND PC 1170,12/X:AS TO COUNT 1, THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO THE UPPER TERM OF 6 YEARS IN STATE PRISON, FOR THE ENHANCEMENT PURSUANT TO PC 667,9(A), THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO AN ADDITIONAL 1 YEAR IN STATE PRISON,/X:THE DEFENDANTIS SENTENCED TO AN ADITIONAL 5 YEARS EACH FOR 4 PRIOR CONVICTIONS PURSUANTTO PC 667(A)(1) FOR A TOTAL OF 20 YEARS TO LIFE IN STATE PRISON, PURSUANT TO PC 667(E)(1), THIS SENTENCE IS DOUBLED TO 40 YEARS TO LIFE FOR A TOTAL OF47 YEARS TO LIFE ON COUNT 1/X:SENTENCE AS TO COUNT 2 IS THE SAME AS COUNT1 AND IS TO RUN CONCURRENT/X:AS TO COUNT 3, THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO1 YEAR IN THE COUNTY JAIL, HE IS GIVEN CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 1 YEAR/X:AS TO COUNT 4, THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO THE UPPER TERM OF 6 YEARS INSTATE PRISON,/X:THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO AN ADITIONAL 5 YEARS EACH FOR 4 PRIOR CONVICTIONS PURSUANT TO PC 667(A)(1) FOR A TOTAL OF 20 YEARS TO LIFE, PURSUANT TO PC 667(E)(1), THIS SENTENCE IS DOUBLED TO 40 YEARS TO LIFEFOR A TOTAL OF 46 YEARS TO LIFE ON COUNT 4, CONSECUTIVE TO COUNT 1/X:THESENTENCE AS TO COUNT 5 IS THE SAME AS THE SENTENCE ON COUNT 4 AND IS TO RUNCONSECUTIVE TO COUNT 1/X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 1,152 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 172 DAYS SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 1,324 DAYS,/2933,1(C)/X:TOTAL AS TO ALL CASES IS 327 YEARS TO LIFE IN STATE PRISON,/DNACOMP/COA:40/VF5:300/CDC/ICNA/PAR/APPEAL/X:CR-11O ORDERS FOR RESTITUTION ARE SIGNED ASFOLLOWS:/X:255,00 TO SUGAKO BERNE; 243,00 TO DE QANG HUANG; 750,00 TO MICHIKO FUJISAKA; 80,00 TO MEI YONG LIU; 100,00 TO BAD LIAN YU/
